summary: Completed testing of Landing Page and Promo System (Iteration 6). All backend APIs (12/12 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly. Landing page displays for unauthenticated users with promo banner, hero section, features grid, and pricing. Auth redirect works - logged-in users visiting '/' are redirected to /dashboard. Prices updated to $4.99/$9.99/$19.99 on both landing page and subscription page.
critical_code_review_comments: Google Play server-side verification is MOCKED - currently trusts purchase tokens from client without calling Google Play Developer API (carried over from iteration 5)
seed_data_creation: Created test users during registration tests (test_earlybird_*, test_trial_*) - these are early bird users with is_early_bird=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 6 features tested and working. Landing page shows for unauthenticated users with promo banner (85 spots remaining). Logged-in users are redirected from '/' to '/dashboard'. Early bird users (first 100) get 90-day trials, others get 7-day trials. Prices are $4.99/$9.99/$19.99.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/promo/status returns 200 (public endpoint, no auth)
Backend: /api/promo/status has spots_remaining, promo_active, total_users, promo_offer, promo_days
Backend: spots_remaining correctly calculated as 100 - total_users
Backend: promo_active=true when spots_remaining > 0, promo_offer='3 months free', promo_days=90
Backend: New user registration sets is_early_bird flag when within first 100
Backend: GET /api/subscriptions/trial-status works for authenticated users
Backend: POST /api/subscriptions/start-trial gives 90 days to early birds
Backend: GET /api/subscriptions/tiers returns correct prices ($4.99, $9.99, $19.99)
Backend: GET /api/plumbing-code returns 11+ chapters (regression passed)
Backend: Plumbing code chapters have proper structure (id, chapter, title)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login works with valid credentials
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns user data
Frontend: Landing page displays for unauthenticated users
Frontend: Promo banner shows 'FIRST 100 USERS GET 3 MONTHS FREE — X SPOTS LEFT'
Frontend: Hero CTA button shows 'Claim Your Free 3 Months'
Frontend: Features grid displays 8 feature cards
Frontend: Pricing grid shows 3 tiers with correct prices
Frontend: CTA buttons navigate to /login
Frontend: Login form works with test credentials
Frontend: After login, user redirected to /dashboard
Frontend: Logged-in user visiting '/' redirected to /dashboard
Frontend: Subscription page shows $4.99/$9.99/$19.99 prices
Frontend: Subscription page shows 'You're subscribed to PRO' banner
Frontend: Plumbing Code page displays chapters with quick jump chips

landing_page.promo_banner: Shows 'FIRST 100 USERS GET 3 MONTHS FREE — X SPOTS LEFT'
landing_page.hero_section: Shows PlumbPro branding and CTA button
landing_page.pricing_section: 3 tiers with correct prices and 'START FREE' buttons

mocked_apis.google_play_server_verification: Server-side Google Play Developer API verification is stubbed. Currently trusts purchase tokens from client and records them without calling Google API. Full verification requires Google Cloud Service Account JSON.
